source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Sixty pairs of measurements were taken at random to estimate the relation between variables X and Y. A least squares regression line was fitted to the collected data. The resulting residual plot is as follows. Which of the following conclusions is appropriate?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: A line is not an appropriate model to describe the relation between X and Y.
